summary: Quick smoke test after admin email update to admin@mastersmeathaus.com. All features verified working: Admin login, BBQ Planner meat selection with customization, CRM Settings with BBQ Portions.

minor.issue: ADMIN_EMAIL in .env still shows old email (admin@mastermeatbox.com) but database has correct email. Not blocking - login works correctly.

action_items: Optional: Update ADMIN_EMAIL in backend/.env to admin@mastersmeathaus.com for consistency
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin email successfully updated to admin@mastersmeathaus.com. All features working: login, BBQ Planner with meat selection (beef, chicken, pork, lamb), steak customization (grade & dry aging), CRM Settings with BBQ Portions tab.

admin_login.notes: Login successful, redirects to admin dashboard with 'Welcome back!' toast

steak_customization.customizable_badge: PASS - All steak products show CUSTOMIZABLE badge
steak_customization.grade_selector: PASS - Shows Standard, Prime, Grass Fed, Wagyu options
steak_customization.dry_aging_selector: PASS - Shows Fresh, 21 Days, 35 Days, 45 Days options
steak_customization.quantity_selector: PASS - Shows +/- buttons with quantity display
steak_customization.price_calculation: PASS - Price updates based on selections

bbq_planner.product_selection: PASS - Clicking product card toggles selection with checkbox

crm_settings.access: PASS - Settings & Media page accessible after login
crm_settings.bbq_portions_tab: PASS - BBQ Portions tab visible and clickable

feature_verification.bbq_planner_meat_selection: VERIFIED - All 4 meat types (beef, chicken, pork, lamb) available
feature_verification.steak_customization: VERIFIED - Grade and dry aging options appear for steak products only
feature_verification.crm_bbq_portions: VERIFIED - BBQ Portions settings accessible and configurable
